response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and web developer with a strong TypeScript/Node.js background, but the role demands deep, sustained C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts — an area where his resume shows only brief historical exposure (NI LabWindows components in 2014–2015 and a C++ bachelor thesis project). The job's core requirements — multi-threaded C++ systems, message brokers for industrial scale, IEC 62443 secure development lifecycle, MQTT, and industrial protocols like Modbus or OPC UA — are entirely absent from his profile. His strengths in event-driven architecture and REST APIs are relevant but insufficient to compensate for the fundamental gap in C++ depth and industrial/embedded systems experience.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across diverse domains, demonstrating adaptability and breadth
Solid event-driven architecture experience (geo-data platform, microservices at Sociomantic) aligns with message-broker and scalable-systems requirements
Strong REST API and networked-application background across multiple production environments
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated — brief NI component work in 2014–2015 and a thesis project; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/JavaScript
No exposure to industrial automation, IEC 62443 security standards, MQTT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, DNP 3.0)
No evidence of multi-threaded or concurrent C++ systems development at any meaningful scale or recency
